summary: Added question bank builder with MCQ templates, required fields, quality checks and JSON examples for future expansion.
Added subject chapter maps for Biology, Chemistry, Physics, Mathematics and English connected to topics, practice, lessons and resources.
Improved MCQ practice flow with separate attempt step, answer reveal, explanation, Urdu explanation, next question and study topic controls.
Added test-specific page hub with deep-page records for MDCAT, FAST, NAT and GAT connected to routes and study content.
Added student dashboard with route selection, progress signals, local performance summary and next-action cards.
Added test route landing hub with connected pathways for medical, engineering, NAT/GAT and international preparation.
Initial GitHub Pages structure with major pages, JSON data, practice engine, mock engine, resources and trial form.
Expanded test groups, tests, skills, subjects, topics, sample questions, mocks, resources, study plans, reviews and media.
Added FAQ, announcements, pathways, homepage stats, filtered resources and searchable help content.
Added Choose My Test, Compare Tests, Glossary, test formats and decision guide.
Added strategies, common mistakes and daily plan checklist with browser-saved completion.
Added worksheets, assignments and score guide for class and teacher use.
Added roadmap, changelog, contributor guide and question-bank targets for future expansion.
Added vocabulary bank, formula bank and curated question sets for deeper study content.
Added diagnostic test, flashcards and browser-saved error log for stronger student self-assessment.
Added premium notes preview page with structured sample notes, related resources and WhatsApp purchase flow.
Added results report page with local progress summary, weak-topic table and next-step recommendations.
Added lesson library foundation with concept, example, strategy, mistake and connected practice links.
Added teacher classroom toolkit with class agendas, connected lessons, worksheets, assignments and follow-up messages.
Added parent guide with progress interpretation, trial-class decisions, routine support and WhatsApp guidance.
Added admissions timeline planner with phased preparation schedules connected to study plans, diagnostics, mocks and trial class.
Added download and print center for printable worksheets, class packs, parent handouts, timelines and checklists.
Added question review hub with wrong-answer patterns, review methods, linked questions and revision routes.
